text: Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Showers, heavy in the morning. A few thunderstorms. Force 4 to 5 south to southwesterly winds, occasionally force 6 with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 5 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. A few thunderstorms at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. A few showers. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few thundery showers. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
Cloudy apart from sunny periods. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 south to southwesterly winds.
